name: dev-script
description: Generates a one-shot dev.sh / dev.ps1 launcher for any project — detects the stack (compose, monorepo, frontend, backend, IdP, mkcert), produces a single script that brings up the whole local infrastructure with colored prefixes per service, healthchecks, robust port reclaim, trap cleanup, idempotent re-runs, and (when applicable) HTTPS-on-LAN via mkcert + Caddy reverse proxy. Cross-platform: bash for Linux/macOS, PowerShell for Windows. Encodes the gotchas painfully learned in JRC projects so each new repo doesn't re-discover them.
